# Indiventure Travellers

> Private heritage tour agency based in Agra, India, operating since 1998. We run government-licensed-guide tours of the Taj Mahal, Agra, Delhi, Jaipur and the wider Golden Triangle, with private air-conditioned transport, from $40 per tour. Rated 4.9/5 from 1,560+ reviews.

## Key facts
- Founded: 1998. Headquarters: Fatehabad Road, Opposite Gateway Hotel, Agra, Uttar Pradesh 282001, India.
- Contact: +91 98765 43210 (phone & WhatsApp, 24/7), hello@indiventuretravellers.com.
- Guides: government-approved, multilingual heritage experts; female guides available on request.
- Pricing: indicative starting prices per person in USD — same-day Taj Mahal tours from $40; guide-only service from $25; multi-day Golden Triangle packages from ~$200. Monument entry fees and optional add-ons are extra; the final price varies by group size and season, and an exact quote is given before payment.
- The Taj Mahal is closed every Friday; our sunrise tours run all other days.
- Pickup available from Delhi, Agra and Jaipur hotels and airports.

## Services
- Same-day Taj Mahal tours from Delhi (by private car, or Gatimaan Express train)
- Sunrise Taj Mahal private tours
- Multi-day Golden Triangle packages (Delhi–Agra–Jaipur, 3–5 days)
- Royal Rajasthan extended tours (7–12 days)
- Photography-focused tours (Taj Mahal, Old Delhi)
- Licensed guide hire (guide-only, guide + car, guide + car + meals, all-inclusive)

## Key pages
- Tours & pricing: https://indiventuretravellers.com/plans
- Hire a licensed guide: https://indiventuretravellers.com/guide-booking
- Destinations: https://indiventuretravellers.com/destinations
- FAQ (tickets, timings, safety): https://indiventuretravellers.com/faq
- Reviews: https://indiventuretravellers.com/reviews
- Contact & booking: https://indiventuretravellers.com/contact

## Policies
- Free cancellation up to 24 hours before tour start.
- No-prepayment reservation options on most day tours; pay on the day.
- Private tours only — no large mixed groups.
- All advertised prices are "from" starting prices; monument entry fees and optional add-ons cost extra and the final quote is confirmed before payment.
